name: Pie-Pan Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs freshly cooked asparagus spears, hot
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Blend in flour.
3. Add chicken broth (canned or homemade) and milk; cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thick and bubbly.
4. Add Cheddar cheese, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, salt, and pepper; stir until cheeses melt.
5. Place asparagus in a 10-inch pie pan, sprayed with vegetable spray.
6. Pour sauce over the asparagus.
7. Sprinkle with 2 tablespoons Parmesan cheese.
8. Broil until bubbly. Makes 6 servings.
